title: phyllanthus lanceolarius
intro: Phyllanthus lanceolarius, also known as the lance-leaf phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory activities. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting anti-cancer and anti-viral properties. Phyllanthus lanceolarius is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or extract, and is used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
